text_original: only paid premium once unlimited talk, down side it gets confused some times less now then originally.
text_zh: 只需支付一次高级版费用即可享受无限通话，缺点是它有时会产生混淆，不过现在比最初好多了。
reply_original: Hi! We are thrilled you're enjoying the unlimited chats! Regarding the confusion, we recently upgraded our Memory Service to help characters stay on track. If they still get lost, please email screenshots to support@fantachat.ai. Our devs will use them to fine-tune the AI's brain. Thanks for sticking with us since the early days!
reply_zh: 嗨！我们很高兴您喜欢无限次聊天！关于您提到的困惑，我们最近升级了记忆服务，以帮助角色保持思路清晰。如果他们仍然出现混乱，请将截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们的开发人员将利用这些截图来微调 AI 的大脑。感谢您从早期阶段就一直支持我们！
